steps.title: Identify each coordinate
steps.content: The graph uses $x$ for molecular weight and $y$ for estimated boiling point. So the ordered pair gives molecular weight first and boiling point second.

steps.title: Interpret the point
steps.content: For the point $(149.02{,}186.05)$, the molecular weight is $149.02$ grams per mole and the estimated boiling point is $186.05$ degrees Celsius. The answer is B.
